steps.title: Name the painting cleanly
steps.content: The blank needs to identify the oil painting as Uprising and then lead into the nonrestrictive "which" clause. A nonrestrictive "which" clause needs a comma immediately before it.

steps.title: Place the comma before which
steps.content: B omits the comma before "which." C puts a comma between "painting" and the title, breaking the noun phrase while still missing the needed comma before "which." D creates a fragment because "which" cannot start an independent sentence here. The answer is A.
